comparison_sdg: The time series are not compliant with the UN metadata, but provide additional information.
indicator_name: Level of water stress: freshwater withdrawal as a proportion of available freshwater resources
target_name: By 2030, substantially increase water-use efficiency across all sectors and ensure sustainable withdrawals and supply of freshwater to address water scarcity and substantially reduce the number of people suffering from water scarcity

data_start_values.value: Mining and quarrying; manufacturing; electricity, gas, steam and air conditioning supply; constructions (ISIC B, C, D and F)
Other services (ISIC E, G to T)

footer_fields.label: Note
footer_fields.value: The data is based on a special evaluation and are not publicly available.

footer_fields.label: Notes
footer_fields.value:
• Freshwater withdrawal (total): Includes water withdrawal by private households. Therefore, the sum of the proportional withdrawals by economic sectors does not total 100%.
• The data is based on a special evaluation and are not publicly available.

data_last_update: Last updated on 2026/03/09. Data for further reporting periods will be added as soon as it becomes available.
